title: God of War show recasts Kratos after Ryan Hurst sustains an injury on set - Engadget
summary: One of the many, many video upcoming game adaptations, Prime Video's God of War , has hit a pretty significant roadblock after a serious on-set injury has forced the show to recast Kratos.
